title: fix: route Websim through app proxy
author: ElliotEtag
pr_body_excerpt:
- Registers Websim in apps.json so the app proxy source of truth includes websim.pollinations.ai.
- Adds a Worker deploy target to apps/_scripts/deploy.sh, keeping Pages as the default for existing apps.
- Points Websim canonical/OG metadata at websim.pollinations.ai.

Checks:
- npx biome check --write apps/apps.json apps/websim/index.html
- bash -n apps/_scripts/deploy.sh
- npm run build --prefix apps/websim
- npm run typecheck --prefix apps/websim
- npx wrangler deploy worker.js --dry-run
- npm test --prefix pollinations-myceli-proxy

gist.headline: Websim finds its way
gist.blurb: Websim is now officially routed through our app proxy, complete with shiny new canonical URLs and metadata.
gist.summary: Registered Websim in apps.json to route websim.pollinations.ai through the app proxy, updated canonical metadata, and added Worker deployment support to the deploy script.
gist.impact: Websim now correctly resolves through the main proxy with accurate OpenGraph metadata, and developers can now deploy Worker-based apps alongside Pages.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as a network engineer, plugging a glowing routing cable into a retro computer monitor representing Websim.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny yellow hard hat, plugging a glowing routing cable into a chunky retro computer monitor. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
